scripts.build: pnpm run typecheck && pnpm -r --if-present run build
scripts.check:database: npx --yes supabase@2.109.1 start && npx --yes supabase@2.109.1 db reset --no-seed && npx --yes supabase@2.109.1 test db && npx --yes supabase@2.109.1 db lint --level error && npx --yes supabase@2.109.1 db advisors --local --type all --fail-on error && node scripts/check-database-types.mjs
scripts.check:release: pnpm run check:dependencies && pnpm run check:all && pnpm run check:database
scripts.check:all: pnpm run typecheck && pnpm run test && pnpm run check:edge-functions && pnpm --filter @workspace/caremetric-train run build && pnpm run check:bundle
